community.subtitle: Join your peers
community.explanationOne: As we progressed in building CGWire, we increasingly felt the need to enhance collaboration between studios. That's why we have fostered both online and offline communities of animation professionals. Topics extend beyond just Kitsu. TDs and production managers share tips and best practices to tackle their day-to-day challenges. Below, you'll find the platform we use to connect with our community.

chat.subtitle: Discord
chat.title: Connect with your peers
chat.explanation: Join our Discord channel. Industry professionals share and exchange best practices about Kitsu and animation/VFX pipelines!

github.subtitle: Github
github.title: Contribute to Kitsu
github.explanation: Post bug reports or feature requests on our GitHub repositories. See how we code, participate in architecture discussions, and even better, send your pull requests!

feedback.subtitle: Canny
feedback.title: Give feedback
feedback.explanation: Post feedback and comments. Vote for existing feature requests. See what is under development and help shape the future of Kitsu with the community.

translate.subtitle: POEditor
translate.title: Translate Kitsu
translate.explanation: Kitsu is already available in 6 languages. With your help, we can go further. Translate Kitsu in your language and allow more people to access our open-source technologies.
